name: O-2 global --dry-run: /pr-source-add --dry-run reports the plan without scaffolding the folder file
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-add.sh" --github acme/repo --id sec-pr --source-class federal-financial-regulator --tree "$PWD/tree" --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ ! -d tree ] && grep -q 'dry-run' err.txt && echo dry_run 1>&2
